# Napoleon Healthcare Foundation

> Napoleon Healthcare Foundation (NHF) is a registered Nigerian community-health NGO (CAC/IT/NO 85319) that provides free medical outreach — consultations, health screening, eye care, dental care, maternal and child health support, and health education — to underserved communities across Delta and Rivers States in Nigeria's South-South region.

Napoleon Healthcare Foundation is a non-profit run by volunteer medical professionals and governed by a board of trustees. Incorporated on 4 March 2016, it has delivered documented outreaches reaching more than 5,200 patients across 10+ communities, schools, churches, and primary health centres. Its work aligns with Sustainable Development Goal 3 (Good Health and Well-being).

## Key pages
- [Home](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/): Overview of NHF's mission and community health work
- [About](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/about): Mission, vision, values, registration, and trustees
- [What We Do](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/what-we-do): Services — consultations, screening, eye and dental care, maternal health, health education
- [Impact](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/impact): Documented outreach figures and reach
- [Outreach Stories](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/stories): Detailed accounts of individual outreaches, with photos
- [Health Education](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/health-education): Public health education on prevention and early detection
- [Partner](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/partner): How organizations can partner with NHF
- [Volunteer](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/volunteer): How medical and support volunteers can join
- [Donate / Support](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/donate): Ways to give and sponsor outreaches
- [Gallery](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/gallery): Photos from outreach programmes
- [Contact](https://napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org/contact): Contact details and frequently asked questions

## Contact
- Email: info@napoleonhealthcarefoundation.org
- Phone / WhatsApp: +234 703 248 2265
- Location: PMB 07, Oghara, Delta State, Nigeria
- Facebook: https://web.facebook.com/Napoleonhealthcare
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/Napoleon_NF

## Notes
- Registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission of Nigeria as Incorporated Trustees (CAC/IT/NO 85319), incorporated 4 March 2016.
- Health education content on the site is for general public information only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice.
